start: ^ATO Personel: How can the Admission and Testing Office help you today?
continue_1: ^ATO Personel: The BukSU Admission and Testing Office serves as the front unit for evaluating students applying to the university.
continue_2: ^ATO Personel: It is responsible for preparing and conducting the BukSU College Admission Test.
continue_3: ^ATO Personel: The office ensures that admissions follow reasonable and just requirements aligned with university standards.
continue_4: ^ATO Personel: These standards are also responsive to the needs of students and other stakeholders.
continue_5: ^You: So, this office was the one responsible for that College Admission Test?
continue_7: ^ATO Personel: You did a good job passing that test, student.
continue_8: ^ATO Personel: Congratulations once again. You are officially part of this university now.
continue_9: ^ATO Personel: Be sure to study well, and thank you for stopping by.
